context: Evaluates correct use of crypto-browserify's createCipheriv and createDecipheriv APIs for AES-256-CBC symmetric encryption and decryption. The solution must correctly handle key/IV parameters and concatenate update() and final() outputs.

checklist.name: Uses createCipheriv
checklist.description: The encrypt function calls createCipheriv('aes-256-cbc', key, iv) from crypto-browserify, not createCipher or a manual implementation.

checklist.name: Uses createDecipheriv
checklist.description: The decrypt function calls createDecipheriv('aes-256-cbc', key, iv) from crypto-browserify with the same key and IV used for encryption.

checklist.name: Concatenates update and final
checklist.description: Both encrypt and decrypt concatenate the results of cipher.update() and cipher.final() to produce the complete output.

checklist.name: Correct encoding handling
checklist.description: Encryption encodes the final output as hex (or base64), and decryption correctly decodes the input from that same encoding and returns a UTF-8 string.

checklist.name: Correct algorithm string
checklist.description: The algorithm 'aes-256-cbc' (or equivalent) is passed to createCipheriv/createDecipheriv, matching the 32-byte key requirement.
